dict.key: Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode

dict.string: nu k8s get pods global morpheus --env prod
nu k8s cycle global morpheus --env prod
nu k8s logs s0 jumanji --env staging -- --since-time="$(gdate -d "2023-09-08 13:00" +"%Y-%m-%dT%T%:z")"
